case_title: SCHILLER, LEON vs. FETT, CINDY et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHILLER, LEON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FETT, CINDY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1930 FRANKLIN ST, #2, S.F. CA.
